source.title: How I Use Obsidian + Claude Cowork to Run My Life
source.author: Linking Your Thinking with Nick Milo

summary: AI 作業系統分三層：自己的想法、給 AI 讀的地圖、可替換的 AI 工具
把筆記留在自己手上，AI 工具只是租來的一層，隨時可換掉
AI 在大筆記庫裡會亂找，給它地圖才找得準
技能要存在自己的筆記裡，不要存在 AI 工具裡

posts.angle: 別把你的東西鎖進 AI 工具
posts.hook: 工具兩年後可能就換了，你的筆記不該跟著陪葬

cards.title: 擁有想法，租用工具
cards.body: 要擁有的是你的想法、你的筆記、你的 AI 工作流；AI 工具本身只是租來的一層，換掉就好

evidence.source_text: you want to own your ideas and thinking, and your AI workflows, and then you just want to rent the actual AI tool itself

wrong.text: 存在 Claude 或其他 AI 工具裡

evidence.source_text: not in Claude's or any other AI tools

right.text: 存在自己的系統、自己的筆記裡

evidence.source_text: Keep your skills here, in your own system, in your own notes

cards.title: 檔案能跟著你走
cards.body: 只要檔案能帶著走，AI 就只是一層可以抽換的東西，甚至將來換成本機模型也行

evidence.source_text: as long as your files can travel with you, your AI can just be a layer that you swap out

cards.text: 擁有你的想法，租用 AI 工具

evidence.source_text: you want to own your ideas and thinking, and your AI workflows, and then you just want to rent the actual AI tool itself

posts.hook: 沒有地圖，它只能在你的筆記庫裡瞎猜

cards.title: 沒地圖就找不準
cards.body: AI 不知道該去哪、也不知道怎麼快速找到相關的東西，結果就是不精準

evidence.source_text: They won't be precise because it doesn't know where to go and it doesn't know how to get relevancy fast.

steps.text: 給它地圖，它才知道哪些檔案相關

evidence.source_text: But give it a map and it can figure out which files are actually relevant.

steps.text: 把相關的挑出來載入，其餘略過

evidence.source_text: It can isolate those, load them into its context, skip the rest.

steps.text: 再給一張技能地圖：有哪些技能、何時該用

evidence.source_text: The skill map gives very clear instructions about what skills exist for your AI, what they do, and exactly when AI should use them.
